summary: core crate + UI fully green (480 Rust tests, 68 UI tests, 0 clippy warnings); the desktop/Tauri workspace member is BLOCKED on missing system GUI libraries (environment), not a code defect.

commands.notes: clean build (~60s); rusqlite bundled compiles SQLite from source

default run (no --ignored) → no live-provider tests → zero quota. Suites: adapters, sessions, runner, resilience, conduct (3953 LoC), council, review, eval, mcp, server, trust, worktree, preflight, auto, tokenizer, etc.

commands.reason: environment: desktop/src-tauri → libdbus-sys build fails: system library `dbus-1` not found via pkg-config (transitive Tauri v2 GUI dep: dbus-1, webkit2gtk, gtk3, libsoup). Not a Consilium code defect; core builds fine in isolation.
same as above — the workspace cannot link the Tauri desktop crate in this headless nix shell.

ui.dir: ui/ (consilium-ui v0.2.0, React + Vite + TypeScript, npm)

zero_quota_e2e.note: The '480 tests' figure is zero-quota COVERAGE across all pipeline layers, not one E2E scenario. These are named, isolated, reproducible zero-quota E2E flows (scripted adapters, no network/quota):

flows.path: scripted adapter -> sessions::spawn -> conduct(plan/route/worker/capture) -> terminal Accept (completed:[1], out.txt written)
WS client -> adapter -> session -> conduct -> normalized event frames -> terminal ServerFrame
adapter -> session -> conduct -> verify(ran, failed) -> grounding veto -> terminal
flows.note: the flow that traverses the VERIFY stage to a terminal outcome

claude.redaction: Unredacted raw stream-json trace was removed (it leaked session/uuid/request ids, cwd, and local mcp_servers/skills/slash_commands); the kept artifact replaces all identifiers with stable placeholders. No API/OAuth token was present.
claude.highlights: exit 0, result 'consilium-phase-minus-one-claude-ok'; apiKeySource=none (subscription OAuth); observed model init 'claude-opus-4-8[1m]' vs assistant 'claude-opus-4-8' -> canonicalize as base_model='claude-opus-4-8' + context_profile='1m' + service_tier='standard' (Exact must compare these SEPARATELY, not by stripping the suffix); dedicated rate_limit_event (five_hour) present in stream.

codex.reason: codex CLI not installed locally; installing/login disallowed by scope + stop-conditions.

gemini.reason: out of scope (would need separate install/login/spend).

acceptance_gate_2_verdict: Consilium built and tested: core + UI PASS with real command output; workspace/desktop failure honestly documented as an environment (system-lib) limitation. Upstream failures were NOT patched.
